LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT PENDING. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted, no opposition filed. Order and judgment pending. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
